NIBSDescription: Intermittent theta-burst stimulation (iTBS) over left M1: 600 pulses as bursts of 3 at 50 Hz, repeated at 5 Hz for 2 s, every 10 s, for ~192 s. Delivered standalone. Intensity dosed at 80% aMT.

IntensitySet.Criterion: MEP amplitude >= 200 uV in at least 5 of 10 trials during ~20% maximal voluntary contraction
IntensitySet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous during contraction

nibs_event_id.Description: Identifier of a stimulation event type with a unique parameter set. Linked to nibs_event_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

stimulator_id.Description: Device generating the waveform. Links to StimulatorSet.StimulatorID.

nibs_element_id.Description: Element delivering stimulation. Links to ElementSet.ElementID.

stimulus_shape.Description: Waveform shape of the base stimulus.

Levels.Biphasic: Biphasic pulse as per stimulator setting

first_inflection.Description: Direction of the first deflection of the induced current.

current_direction.Description: Direction of current flow in the coil winding, read with the coil in the calibration-block orientation (stimulating face away from the viewer, top face toward the viewer, handle or leading edge pointing away). cl and co apply to circular coils; cl-co and co-cl apply to figure-of-eight coils and name the left wing then the right wing.

Levels.cl: Circular coil, single winding, current clockwise
Levels.co: Circular coil, single winding, current counterclockwise
Levels.cl-co: Figure-of-eight coil, left wing clockwise, right wing counterclockwise
Levels.co-cl: Figure-of-eight coil, left wing counterclockwise, right wing clockwise

stimulus_intensity.Description: Delivered amplitude of every pulse in the protocol (constant).

stimulus_duration.Description: Pulse width (contiguous non-zero current through the coil).

pattern1_count.Description: Number of base stimuli in one pattern1 unit (the burst).

pattern1_interval.Description: Onset-to-onset interval between base stimuli within a burst (50 Hz).

pattern2_count.Description: Number of pattern1 units (bursts) in one pattern2 unit (the train).

pattern3_count.Description: Number of pattern2 units (trains) in the full protocol.

pattern3_interval.Description: Onset-to-onset interval between trains; includes the inter-train off time (2 s on + 8 s off = 10 s).

intensity_reference.Description: Anchor used to set the intensity. Links to IntensitySet.IntensityID. Closed vocabulary (rMT, aMT, 1mV, e-field, absolute).

intensity_scaling.Description: Multiplier applied to the reference value, or 'absolute' for a directly specified value.
